report_meta.title: Panelin GPT — Live Version Configuration Audit & KB Restructuring Plan
report_meta.scope: Complete analysis of all files configuring the Panelin GPT live version, data redundancy audit, and restructuring plan

system_architecture.overview: Custom GPT on OpenAI backed by a FastAPI backend (Wolf API) deployed to GCP Cloud Run, with multi-level Knowledge Base, Google Sheets integration, and PDF generation capabilities.
system_architecture.data_flow: GPT Builder → (HTTP + X-API-Key) → Wolf API (Cloud Run) → GCS / Google Sheets / Local Catalog

layer_1_gpt_builder_configuration.description: Files that define the GPT's identity, instructions, and action schema in OpenAI GPT Builder

files.purpose: Master configuration — instructions (v2.5 Canonical), KB hierarchy, actions definitions, capabilities, business rules v6.0, deployment manifest
issues_found: Contains wolf_api_kb_write_password 'mywolfy' in plain text

files.purpose: Condensed system instructions in RTF format pasted into GPT Builder
OpenAPI v3.0.0 schema in RTF format — copy-pasted into GPT Builder Actions panel

layer_2_openapi_schema_repo.description: Machine-readable OpenAPI schema in the repository

files.purpose: Machine-readable OpenAPI schema for GPT Actions — intended to match what's in GPT Builder
issues_found: Schema version 2.2.0 does not match live v3.0.0
Missing 13 API endpoints that exist in production

layer_3_knowledge_base_files.description: 18 files uploaded to GPT Builder as Knowledge Base, organized by priority level

level_1_master.description: Source of truth for panel prices, formulas, and specifications

files.purpose: Core KB — panel prices, quotation formulas, business rules, institutional info, kits fijación, energy formulas
issues_found: user_corrections has 4 stale/duplicate MCP_Memory entries
ISOFRIG_PIR espesores have no prices ('Consultar')

files.purpose: Complete BROMYROS product base — Level 1 pricing reference

verification.method: Python programmatic comparison of all fields

files.explanation: bromyros_pricing_master.json wraps the exact same data as bromyros_pricing_gpt_optimized.json inside a {meta, data} envelope. The meta field adds a 'generated_from' note. All actual data (indices, familia_groups, products, metadata) is byte-for-byte identical.
issues_found: 100% duplicate of optimized version — pure waste of 142KB

files.purpose: Accessory catalog with real prices — goteros, babetas, fijaciones, selladores
issues_found: Duplicate SKU 6805 used for both 'Arandela Plana' and 'Arandela Carrocero'
95% of content already in bromyros_pricing

files.purpose: Parametric BOM rules for 6 construction systems, autoportancia table, kits fijación
issues_found: Autoportancia for ISOWALL_PIR and ISOFRIG_PIR not included in autoportancia.tablas

files.purpose: Optimized pricing database with multi-level indexing for fast lookups
issues_found: Missing indices: by_espesor, by_uso (would improve lookup)
Is identical to bromyros_pricing_master.json

files.purpose: Product descriptions, variants, images from Shopify store
issues_found: Largest file at 760KB — dominates token budget
89% of content unused by GPT
body_html is raw Shopify HTML, not useful for GPT reasoning

files.purpose: Quick index for Code Interpreter lookups
issues_found: Redundant with shopify_catalog indices and bromyros indices

files.purpose: Cross-reference validation against 31 real budgets

unique_content.note: Both products already exist in bromyros_pricing with full pricing data
unique_content.validated_formulas: 12 formulas with 'validado: true' flag — but identical formulas exist in BMC_Base
unique_content.sistemas_fijacion: Detailed fixing system pricing — but overlaps with BMC_Base kits_fijacion and bom_rules kits_fijacion_detalle

issues_found: All prices identical to BMC_Base_Conocimiento
Only 2 unique products (ISOROOF_PLUS, ISOROOF_FOIL) — already in bromyros
Creates confusion about which is the 'real' source of truth

files.purpose: Web snapshot for price verification and stock status
issues_found: Stale — last verified Jan 15, nearly 2 months old
Contains recrawl_policy instructions but no automation exists to execute them

files.purpose: 5-phase quotation process with formulas and examples
Sales evaluation + training guide with competency metrics
BROMYROS pricing lookup instructions — how to query indices
issues_found: References bromyros_pricing_gpt_optimized.json directly — needs update after restructuring

files.purpose: PDF generation workflow v2.0 with template design spec
SOP commands (/estado, /checkpoint, /consolidar, etc.)
Technical rules for overhangs/eaves — 5 rules
issues_found: RTF format may cause parsing issues in OpenAI — should be plain text

files.purpose: Meta-guide explaining how to use the KB itself
files.status: REMOVE from KB — content belongs in GPT system instructions, not KB
issues_found: Self-referential: a KB file explaining how to use KB files
Content is already covered in Panelin_GPT_config.json instructions

files.purpose: Internal analysis report from Feb 2026 — diagnostic findings
files.status: REMOVE from KB — internal report, not operational
issues_found: Historical analysis document — confuses RAG retrieval with non-operational content

files.purpose: Project README — development history, deployment guides, architecture docs
files.status: REMOVE from KB — project docs, zero GPT operational value
issues_found: 116KB of development documentation
Contains PR analysis, branch cleanup guides, deployment checklists
3rd largest file by token count — massive noise for RAG

layer_4_backend_api.description: Wolf API — the live FastAPI backend serving GPT Actions

files.purpose: FastAPI app v3.0.0 — ALL endpoints inline (quotation, KB persistence, Google Sheets)
Production Docker image (python:3.11-slim, port 8080, uvicorn)
Modular Google Sheets router — EXISTS but NOT imported by main.py
files.status: DEAD CODE — main.py has inline sheets implementation
issues_found: Python syntax/indentation errors in multiple places
Never imported — duplicate of inline code in main.py

files.purpose: Event-sourced KB architecture routes (/api/kb/architecture/*)
API key validation + write password authentication
KB version management service layer
SQLAlchemy models for KB versioning
Pydantic schemas for KB API
Database session management
Extended entrypoint that imports wolf_api.main.app and adds Panelin v4 engine routes (/api/quote, /api/validate, /api/sai-score)
issues_found: wolf_api/Dockerfile runs 'main:app' from wolf_api/ directly — v4 engine routes likely NOT running in production

files.purpose: CD — Deploy Wolf API Docker image to Cloud Run on push to main
CI — Generate GPT deployment package artifact when KB files change
files.note: Cannot auto-deploy to OpenAI — manual upload required (~15 min)

files.purpose: Production Docker image for Wolf API (port 8080)
MCP server Docker image (port 8000) — separate from Wolf API
Google Cloud Build config for backend/frontend services — separate from Wolf API
Server config, security, monitoring, business logic, feature flags
Environment variables template
Consolidated reference of BOM rules + metrics + GPT config
Logo for PDF generation
Master GPT configuration (also in Layer 1)

layer_7_panelin_v4_engine.description: Calculation engine mounted via app.py — may not run in production

files.purpose: Full quotation processing
BOM calculations
Pricing logic
Quotation validation
Request mode classification (informativo/pre_cotizacion/formal)
Natural language request parsing
SRE calculations
SAI scoring engine

finding_01_duplicate_pricing_files.title: bromyros_pricing_master.json is 100% identical to bromyros_pricing_gpt_optimized.json
finding_01_duplicate_pricing_files.explanation: Master wraps the exact same data inside {meta: {generated_from: 'bromyros_pricing_gpt_optimized.json'}, data: <identical_content>}. The data object is byte-for-byte identical.
finding_01_duplicate_pricing_files.impact: 142KB / ~47K tokens of pure waste uploaded to GPT KB

finding_02_shopify_catalog_bloat.title: shopify_catalog_v1.json is 89% bloat — 760KB file dominates token budget
finding_02_shopify_catalog_bloat.impact: ~253K tokens — 56% of entire KB budget consumed by one bloated file
finding_02_shopify_catalog_bloat.recommendation: Rebuild as slim panelin_products.json with only title, description (200 chars), SKUs, image URLs

finding_03_unificada_duplicate.title: BMC_Base_Unificada_v4.json is 95% duplicate of BMC_Base_Conocimiento_GPT-2.json

evidence.unique_products_note: Both already exist in bromyros_pricing with full data

finding_03_unificada_duplicate.impact: 11KB / ~3.6K tokens of near-duplicate data, creates source-of-truth confusion
finding_03_unificada_duplicate.recommendation: DELETE — fold 2 unique product specs into panelin_core.json

finding_04_accessories_overlap.title: accessories_catalog.json is 95% duplicate of bromyros_pricing
finding_04_accessories_overlap.impact: 49KB / ~16K tokens mostly redundant with bromyros data
finding_04_accessories_overlap.recommendation: DELETE — add the 1 unique SKU (BBAL) to panelin_catalog_ref.json

finding_05_triple_stored_autoportancia.title: Autoportancia data stored in 3 files with identical values
finding_05_triple_stored_autoportancia.impact: Inconsistency risk — updating one file but not the others creates contradictions
finding_05_triple_stored_autoportancia.recommendation: Single source in panelin_core.json → autoportancia section

finding_06_triple_stored_kits_fijacion.title: Kits fijación data stored in 3 files with different structures
finding_06_triple_stored_kits_fijacion.impact: Same data in 3 different structures — GPT may reference wrong one or get confused
finding_06_triple_stored_kits_fijacion.recommendation: Single source in panelin_core.json → kits_fijacion section

finding_07_non_operational_files_in_kb.title: 3 files with zero GPT operational value are in the KB

files.reason: Project documentation — development history, PR guides, deployment checklists
Internal analysis report from Feb 2026 — historical diagnostic
Meta-guide about how to use KB files — belongs in system instructions, not KB

finding_07_non_operational_files_in_kb.impact: These files pollute RAG retrieval — GPT may retrieve README content instead of actual product data

finding_08_fragmented_instructions.title: 6 separate instruction files fragment operational knowledge
finding_08_fragmented_instructions.impact: RAG may retrieve wrong instruction file for a given query. User asking about PDF gets quotation process instead.
finding_08_fragmented_instructions.recommendation: MERGE all into single panelin_operations.md with clear sections

finding_09_api_schema_outdated.title: gpt_actions_openapi_schema.json (v2.2.0) is severely outdated vs live API (v3.0.0)
finding_09_api_schema_outdated.impact: Repo does not accurately represent the live API. Anyone using the repo to configure the GPT would get an incomplete schema.

finding_10_version_inconsistencies.title: Version numbers inconsistent across 5 configuration files
finding_10_version_inconsistencies.impact: Unclear what the actual current version is — confusing for development and debugging
finding_10_version_inconsistencies.recommendation: Standardize to single version (3.4.0) across all files

finding_s1_password_in_repo.title: KB write password exposed in Panelin_GPT_config.json
finding_s1_password_in_repo.recommendation: Remove password from committed config file. Reference as environment variable only.

data_redundancy_matrix.description: Shows which data exists in multiple files

api_kb_integration_analysis.current_state: GPT carries ~180KB of static pricing data in KB that duplicates Wolf API capabilities

gpt_needs_in_kb_for_reasoning.product_classification: Families, types, espesores — to understand what user wants BEFORE calling API
gpt_needs_in_kb_for_reasoning.bom_rules: Must know which accessories to include per construction system
gpt_needs_in_kb_for_reasoning.business_rules: IVA, derivation policy, minimum slope, etc.
gpt_needs_in_kb_for_reasoning.instructions: How to use the API correctly, quotation process, PDF generation

proposed_strategy.rule_1: For PRICES → call API first, KB catalog as fallback
proposed_strategy.rule_2: For TECHNICAL VALIDATION → use KB (autoportancia, BOM)
proposed_strategy.rule_6: If API fails → use panelin_catalog_ref.json as backup

restructuring_plan.summary: Consolidate 18 files into 5 optimized files, eliminate all redundancy, leverage API for dynamic data

file_1_panelin_core.role: THE BRAIN — single source of truth for rules, formulas, validation

file_2_panelin_catalog_ref.role: REFERENCE — unified pricing catalog with enhanced indices
file_2_panelin_catalog_ref.gpt_usage: Fallback pricing when API unavailable. GPT should PREFER calling /product_price API.

file_3_panelin_products.role: DISPLAY — slim product descriptions and images for presentation

file_4_panelin_operations.role: PLAYBOOK — all operational instructions in one searchable document

file_5_panelin_web_snapshot.note: Small and focused — no changes needed

panelin_gpt_config_json.update_instructions: Replace FUENTE DE VERDAD hierarchy (7 levels) with new 4-source API-first hierarchy
panelin_gpt_config_json.update_deployment: Update files_to_upload list to 5 new filenames
panelin_gpt_config_json.remove_password: Remove wolf_api_kb_write_password from plain text config

instrucciones_gpt_rtf.update_source_hierarchy: Match new 4-source hierarchy from GPT config
instrucciones_gpt_rtf.add_api_first_strategy: Add rules for when to call API vs use KB

gpt_actions_openapi_schema_json.action: Replace entire content with user-provided v3.0.0 schema

generate_gpt_config_workflow.update_file_paths: Reference new KB filenames in trigger paths and package generation

validate_gpt_files_py.update_expected_files: Validate new 5-file set instead of old 18-file set

autoconfig_gpt_py.update_package_contents: Generate deployment package with new files

phase_1_build_new_files.description: Generate the 5 new KB files — additive, no risk
tasks: Generate panelin_core.json from BMC_Base + bom_rules + Unificada unique data
Generate panelin_catalog_ref.json from bromyros + 1 unique accessory + new indices
Generate panelin_products.json by slimming shopify_catalog (89% reduction)
Generate panelin_operations.md by consolidating 6 instruction files + new API section

phase_2_update_configuration.description: Update all configuration files to reference new structure
tasks: Update Panelin_GPT_config.json instructions + file references + remove password

phase_4_validation.description: Verify zero data loss and correctness
tasks: Automated validation: every product/price/formula in old files exists in new files
Verify API endpoints match v3.0.0 schema
Verify total KB size under 250KB target
Test GPT with new KB files manually

phase_5_archive.description: Preserve old files without polluting the active codebase
tasks: Move all 18 replaced files to archive/kb_v7/
Commit with clear message about migration

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Data loss during merge — a product, formula, or rule gets dropped
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Automated validation script that compares every data point between old and new files

risks_and_mitigations.risk: API becomes single point of failure for pricing
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: panelin_catalog_ref.json contains full pricing as offline fallback

risks_and_mitigations.risk: RAG retrieval quality degrades with restructured files
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Fewer, more focused files should IMPROVE RAG accuracy vs current noise

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Team members reference old file names in conversations/workflows
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Archive old files (don't delete), update all automation references, document migration

risks_and_mitigations.risk: GPT instructions become too long after adding API-first strategy
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: New instructions are actually shorter — removing 7-level hierarchy for 4-source hierarchy

acceptance_criteria: 5 new KB files generated, all valid JSON/Markdown
Zero data loss: every product, price, formula, rule from old files exists in new files
No duplicate data: autoportancia in 1 place, kits in 1 place, pricing in 1 place
Old files archived in archive/kb_v7/ (not deleted)
No passwords or secrets in committed files
